item.title: A Complete Restoration: 120-Year-Old House
item.description: A look at the restoration of a 120-year-old house, with focus on the building process, craftsmanship, tools, and project progress. What details stand out most in this restoration?

media:content.media:title: A Complete Restoration: 120-Year-Old House
media:content.media:description: A look at the restoration of a 120-year-old house, with focus on the building process, craftsmanship, tools, and project progress. What details stand out most in this restoration?

item.title: Building a Dream Home: Episode 43
item.description: Episode 43 follows the building process on a dream home, with hands-on work, tools, and steady progress on site. A practical look at craftsmanship and construction from start to finish.

media:content.media:title: Building a Dream Home: Episode 43
media:content.media:description: Episode 43 follows the building process on a dream home, with hands-on work, tools, and steady progress on site. A practical look at craftsmanship and construction from start to finish.

item.title: Mastering Deck Framing for a Long, Tough Deck
item.description: Deck framing takes careful layout, solid materials, and steady progress on site. This build focuses on the framing process and the craftsmanship needed to create a strong, lasting deck.

media:content.media:title: Mastering Deck Framing for a Long, Tough Deck
media:content.media:description: Deck framing takes careful layout, solid materials, and steady progress on site. This build focuses on the framing process and the craftsmanship needed to create a strong, lasting deck.

item.title: Got Building Questions? Answers on the Job Site
item.description: Common building questions are answered directly from the job site, with practical tips and insights from real-world construction experience.

media:content.media:title: Got Building Questions? Answers on the Job Site
media:content.media:description: Common building questions are answered directly from the job site, with practical tips and insights from real-world construction experience.

item.title: Building a Dream Home: Episode 43
item.description: Construction continues as another major milestone is reached, bringing the custom dream home closer to completion with expert craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Building a Dream Home: Episode 43
media:content.media:description: Construction continues as another major milestone is reached, bringing the custom dream home closer to completion with expert craftsmanship.

item.title: Reviewing and Unboxing a Dream Hammer
item.description: A highly anticipated hammer is unboxed and reviewed, highlighting its design, features, and performance for professional construction work.

media:content.media:title: Reviewing and Unboxing a Dream Hammer
media:content.media:description: A highly anticipated hammer is unboxed and reviewed, highlighting its design, features, and performance for professional construction work.

item.title: Let's Get Back On The Mountain Ep 50
item.description: The team returns to the mountain property to tackle new construction challenges and continue making progress on the project.

media:content.media:title: Let's Get Back On The Mountain Ep 50
media:content.media:description: The team returns to the mountain property to tackle new construction challenges and continue making progress on the project.

item.title: Leftover Wood Into a Huge Barn
item.description: Leftover lumber is put to good use as it becomes part of a large barn build, showing how careful planning can maximize materials and minimize waste.

media:content.media:title: Leftover Wood Into a Huge Barn
media:content.media:description: Leftover lumber is put to good use as it becomes part of a large barn build, showing how careful planning can maximize materials and minimize waste.

item.title: Rafters and Overhang Framing for a Small Income
item.description: Rafters and roof overhangs are framed with precision, bringing the home's structure one step closer to completion while ensuring strength and durability.

media:content.media:title: Rafters and Overhang Framing for a Small Income
media:content.media:description: Rafters and roof overhangs are framed with precision, bringing the home's structure one step closer to completion while ensuring strength and durability.

item.title: Precision Wall Framing & Drainage Tricks
item.description: A practical look at wall framing and drainage details on the job site, with a focus on careful layout, solid construction, and clean progress. What details matter most in your builds?

item.title: Another Tweener Project
item.description: A look at another in-between building project, with focus on the work, tools, and progress on site. Practical construction and renovation details from start to finish. What comes next?
